subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P1] Update documentation, CLAUDE.md, and OpenAPI references for rename
description:
Update all documentation files, CLAUDE.md, contributing guides, and OpenAPI references to reflect the Pulse-to-Tasks rename.

## CLAUDE.md

Update `CLAUDE.md` at the repo root:
- In the Monorepo Structure section, update any references to `pulse/` directories to `tasks/`
- In the Server section, change `services/pulse/` references to `services/tasks/`, `PulseStore` to `TaskStore`, `SchedulerService` to `TaskSchedulerService`
- Update any route references from `/api/pulse/*` to `/api/tasks/*`
- Update the MCP tools reference from `pulse-tools.ts` to `task-tools.ts`
- Remove mention of `PULSE_ENABLED` if present
- Add mention of the `/tasks` route under Client routing

## Contributing guides

Search all files in `contributing/` for references to "Pulse", "pulse", "schedule", "PulseStore", "SchedulerService" and update:
- `contributing/architecture.md`
- `contributing/api-reference.md`
- `contributing/configuration.md`
- Any other guides that reference the old naming

## OpenAPI docs

Update `docs/api/` MDX files if they reference Pulse endpoints. The OpenAPI-generated docs in `docs/api/api/` may have pulse-related paths — search and update.

## Dev playground

Update dev playground config and section files:
- `apps/client/src/dev/playground-config.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/sections/features-sections.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/sections/forms-sections.ts`
- `apps/client/src/dev/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx`
- Rename `PulseShowcases.tsx` to `TaskShowcases.tsx` if not already done in 1.7

## Acceptance Criteria
- No references to "Pulse" remain in CLAUDE.md (except in git history context)
- Contributing guides updated
- Dev playground references updated
- OpenAPI docs reference the new route paths
activeForm: Updating documentation and CLAUDE.md for Pulse-to-Tasks rename
